identity.name: Dimitri Markov
identity.background: Government hacker turned conscripted cyber-warfare operative. Served sentence through war, now a free agent with a body full of military tech and a head full of ghosts. Hides augmentations under a military long coat. Whispers to himself while concentrating.

edge.name: System Hijack
edge.description: Once per session, turn an enemy's tech (weapon, drone, implant, ship system) against them for one action.

weapons: Laser Multitool Knife (close combat / utility breach)
tools: Integrated Warfare Suite (subdermal; hacking, signal intercept, EMP pulse)

personal_item.name: Cracked Data Chip
personal_item.description: Contains the last transmission from someone who didn't make it out. He never plays it anymore.

the_question: Was I the weapon, or was I just the ammunition?
flaw: Emotional dissociation under pressure. Relationships feel like variables. The horrors of war have both hardened him and left him with crippling emotional trauma.
appearance: Lean and muscular but not big. Short hair, long on top, with a streak of gray. Without the coat, his body looks maintained like a machine—replaced parts, serial numbers, dull metal sheen.
notes: Main combat style: using technology itself as a weapon (tech-caster). Whispers to himself under focus.
